architecture: {"encoder": "Bidirectional RNN (biRNN) with forward and backward recurrent neural networks (GRU-based). Each word x_j is encoded into an annotation h_j = [\u2192h_j; \u2190h_j] concatenating the forward and backward hidden states, capturing context from both directions.", "decoder": "Recurrent neural network (GRU) with attention. At each step i, it computes a context vector c_i = \u03a3_j \u03b1_{ij} h_j, where \u03b1_{ij} is a soft weight from an alignment model. The probability of target word y_i is conditional on the previous word y_{i-1}, decoder state s_i, and context c_i.", "alignment_model": "Feedforward neural network a(s_{i-1}, h_j) = v_a^T tanh(W_a s_{i-1} + U_a h_j). The outputs e_{ij} are normalized via softmax to produce attention weights \u03b1_{ij}.", "output_layer": "A maxout hidden layer followed by a softmax to compute the probability of the next target word."}
